briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the collapse of fintech middleware company Synapse, raising serious questions about consumer protection in embedded banking.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple has acquired UK-based open banking startup Credit Kudos, signalling the tech giant's growing interest in leveraging financial data for credit and payments services.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep-dive analysis exploring how open banking frameworks are reshaping payments competition and what that means for incumbents and fintechs alike.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is driving a wave of unconventional credit card products, blurring the lines between traditional credit, rewards, and embedded finance.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[How to fix Canadian VC](https://betakit.com/how-to-fix-canadian-vc/)** — *BetaKit* — A timely examination of the structural challenges facing Canada's venture capital ecosystem and what reforms could better support homegrown startups, including fintech.

- **[Gap between richest and poorest Canadians widened again in 2025, StatsCan says](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/canada-wealth-gap-grew-2025-9.7162167?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — New Statistics Canada data shows Canada's wealth inequality grew further in 2025, underscoring the urgent need for fintech-driven financial inclusion solutions.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada's government formally flagged screen scraping as a security risk and set an open banking implementation target, a foundational moment in Canada's ongoing open banking journey. *(Note: Included from global pool for its direct relevance to Canadian fintech regulation.)*

- **[Canada's economy adds 14,000 jobs in March after February's whopping losses](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/canadian-economy-march-2026-9.7158761?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Canada's labour market showed modest recovery in March 2026, adding 14,000 jobs following significant losses the prior month, with broader economic conditions affecting fintech investment sentiment.

- **[WELL Subsidiary CYBERWELL Launches CYDEcore Fusion Platform and Provides Strategic Business Update to Address Escalating Cybersecurity Threats](https://financialpost.com/pmn/business-wire-news-releases-pmn/well-subsidiary-cyberwell-launches-cydecore-fusion-platform-and-provides-strategic-business-update-to-address-escalating-cybersecurity-threats)** — *Financial Post* — Canadian health-tech firm WELL's cybersecurity subsidiary CyberWell has unified its security assets into a single platform, reflecting the growing importance of cybersecurity infrastructure relevant to fintech data protection.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Community event platform Wygo secures nearly $1.6 million pre-seed](https://betakit.com/community-event-platform-wygo-secures-nearly-1-6-million-pre-seed/)** — *BetaKit* — A Canadian startup closes a pre-seed round, a reminder of the early-stage funding dynamics that Atlantic fintech founders navigate as they seek to build and scale within the regional ecosystem.

- **[Hootsuite founder Ryan Holmes returns as interim CEO](https://betakit.com/hootsuite-founder-ryan-holmes-returns-as-interim-coo/)** — *BetaKit* — The leadership shake-up at one of Canada's most recognized tech companies highlights the founder-led resilience story that echoes across Atlantic Canada's own emerging startup community.
